description: Interactive posts asking followers to choose between product variants or preferences, creating engagement through community opinion-sharing on food and beverage choices.
structural_recipe: Post a close-up or appetizing image of a popular food item with a caption asking followers to choose between two variants (texture, preparation style, location, etc.). Use question format with 'أين' (where) or preference phrases like 'هل تفضلون' (do you prefer). Frame it as seeking authentic local recommendations or personal taste preferences.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value community consensus and local expertise. Food preference questions tap into shared cultural food traditions and create opportunity for followers to assert their taste identity. The specificity (e.g., كنافة textures) makes it relatable and drives comments from users with strong opinions about authentic preparations.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure product choices respect halal food standards and Islamic dietary preferences
Avoid framing preferences in ways that could be seen as challenging traditional food culture
Location-specific recommendations require accurate local knowledge
cultural_constraints: Must feature culturally appropriate food items and preparation methods
Preference options should reflect actual local variants rather than arbitrary choices
